## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (gofmt, vet, lint, tests)
- [ ] Both the production and `-tags dev` builds compile
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] Package boundaries respected (no business logic in `httpapi`; `domain` stays dependency-free)
- [ ] Docs / CHANGELOG updated if user-facing
